title: isocoma azteca
intro: Isocoma azteca, also known as bear's head or desert isocoma, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of terpenoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Isocoma azteca include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application, and its leaves and stems can also be used in traditional medicine preparations.
